10-Year Renewable Visa

UAE Golden Visa

Secure your future in the UAE with the prestigious Golden Visa. 10-year renewable residency for investors, entrepreneurs, scientists, and exceptional talents. Apply via WhatsApp from anywhere.

Golden Visa Benefits

  • 10-year renewable residency visa
  • 100% business ownership allowed
  • Sponsor family members with same duration
  • No need for UAE employer sponsor
  • Multiple entries and flexible stay
  • Work permit included

Who is Eligible for Golden Visa?

Investors

Property investors (AED 2M+), public investment fund depositors

  • Property worth AED 2 million or more
  • Investment fund deposit
  • Valid passport
  • Emirates ID (if applicable)

Entrepreneurs

Business owners with approved projects

  • Approved startup from accredited incubator
  • Minimum capital requirements
  • Valid business license
  • Business plan approval

Talented Professionals

Scientists, doctors, engineers, artists, and specialists

  • Valid employment contract
  • Salary threshold (varies by category)
  • Educational credentials attested
  • Recommendation from relevant authority

Outstanding Students

Top graduates from UAE and international universities

  • GPA of 3.75 or higher
  • Graduation from top 100 universities
  • Recent graduation (within 2 years)
  • No prior employment required

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does Golden Visa processing take?

With our expedited service inside Dubai Immigration building, most Golden Visa applications are processed within 3-7 business days.

Can I apply for Golden Visa via WhatsApp?

Yes! Simply send your documents via WhatsApp and our team will handle the entire application process remotely.

What is the minimum property value for investor visa?

The minimum property value is AED 2 million for the Golden Visa investor category.

Can my family get Golden Visa too?

Yes, Golden Visa holders can sponsor spouse, children, and even domestic workers for the same 10-year duration.
